title: 以下、進めて。本番環境で動作するか確認せよ。 • 解決しました。Hybrid Failover の即 fail 文言は AGENTS.md で recovery matrix 前提に修正し、run- kernel-council-review.sh には実際の recovery retry を追加しました。最初の council 判定が落ちて も、1 回だけ force_copilot_continuity + gemini/xai backfill + metered override で再試行し、それ でもだめなときだけ fail します。あわせて test-shadow-continui...
summary_text: **Findings (ordered by severity)** - **High:** Production router still hard-falls back to a stale Gemini model (`gemini-3.1-pro`) when `MODEL` is invalid/empty for Gemini lanes, which can recreate the 404 failure path. - [fugue-tutti-router.yml#L849](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-router.yml#L849) - **High:** Shared matrix builder defaults are still stale (`gemini-3.1-pro-preview`), so workflows/scripts that consume this builder can still emit obsolete Gemini model values. - [build-agent-matrix.sh#L23](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/lib/build-agent-matrix.sh#L23) - [build-agent-matrix.sh#L99](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/lib/build-agent-matrix.sh#L99) - [build-agent-matrix.sh#L143](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/lib/build-agent-matrix.sh#L143) - [build-agent-matrix.sh#L267](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/lib/build-agent-matrix.sh#L267) - **Medium:** Context resolver still invokes model-policy with stale Gemini primary (`gemini-3.1-pro-preview`), creating policy drift versus updated 2.5 defaults. - [resolve-orchestration-context.sh#L604](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/resolve-orchestration-context.sh#L604) - **Medium:** Local/simulation orchestration still pins stale Gemini primary/fallback (`3.1-pro-preview` / `3-flash`), so local verification can diverge from intended production defaults. - [run-local-orchestration.sh#L582](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh#L582) - [run-local-orchestration.sh#L583](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh#L583) - [sim-orchestrator-switch.sh#L69](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/sim-orchestrator-switch.sh#L69) - [sim-orchestrator-switch.sh#L70](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/sim-orchestrator-switch.sh#L70) - **Medium:** Model-policy test expectations are inconsistent with current policy direction, and one “invalid” case currently uses a valid model, reducing regression value. - stale default expectation: [test-model-policy.sh#L97](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/tests/test-model-policy.sh#L97) - invalid case currently valid input: [test-model-policy.sh#L163](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/tests/test-model-policy.sh#L163) and [test-model-policy.sh#L165](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/tests/test-model-policy.sh#L165) - **Medium (propagation gap):** `implement_confirmed` is accepted and normalized in router but never applied to routing outputs/decisions, so propagation is asymmetric vs `implement_request`. - input/env wiring: [fugue-tutti-router.yml#L130](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-router.yml#L130), [fugue-tutti-router.yml#L308](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-router.yml#L308) - parse-only usage: [fugue-tutti-router.yml#L404](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-router.yml#L404) - no corresponding output in prepare outputs block: [fugue-tutti-router.yml#L267](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-router.yml#L267) **What looks fixed (no remaining gap found there)** - Caller -> router `implement_request` propagation is present and used. - caller passthrough: [fugue-tutti-caller.yml#L644](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-caller.yml#L644), [fugue-tutti-caller.yml#L645](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-caller.yml#L645), [fugue-tutti-caller.yml#L646](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-caller.yml#L646) - router override logic: [fugue-tutti-router.yml#L452](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-router.yml#L452), [fugue-tutti-router.yml#L458](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-router.yml#L458) - wiring test coverage exists for this path:...
